programme.desc: The life and work of George Stevens, who directed films including Shane, The Greatest Story Ever Told and The Diary of Anne Frank and won Oscars for A Place in the Sun and Giant.

programme.title: Discovering: Jon Voight
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the actor, who starred in Midnight Cowboy, Deliverance and Runaway Train and won an Academy Award for his role in 1978 film Coming Home.

programme.title: UFO
programme.desc: A look at how acclaimed psychiatrist John Mack began an investigation into claims of alien abduction and the shocking discoveries he made.

programme.title: McEnroe
programme.desc: Set over the course of one night in New York, this documentary invites John McEnroe to reflect on his life and career. McEnroe's children and wife Patty Smyth offer their personal insights, enriched with intimate home video footage and previously unseen archive material from big matches.

programme.title: The Alien Autopsy Scandal
programme.desc: The documentary reveals how Hollywood producer Bob Kiviat pressed Ray and Gary about the source of the alien autopsy video as claims of a hoax grew and UFO hearings raised new questions.

programme.title: Gascoigne
programme.desc: Documentary about Paul Gascoigne, which charts his rise to fame from his humble roots in the North East to the world stage and his subsequent personal problems. The film features an extensive interview with the troubled former footballing superstar, as well as comment from those who admired his skills, including Wayne Rooney, Jose Mourinho and Gazza's ex-England and Tottenham Hotspur team-mate Gar

programme.title: The Two Escobars
programme.desc: How the fates of two Colombians - Andrés Escobar, the inspirational captain of Nacional, and Pablo Escobar, the notorious leader of the Medellin cartel - were permanently linked.

programme.title: Wild Science
programme.desc: Tracing the brown bear's evolution from Ice Age giants to modern omnivores, and witnessing their bond with salmon and the intricate ecosystems that shape their survival.

programme.title: Wild Battlegrounds
programme.desc: Exploring how different animals use the terrain that surrounds them to their advantage and use their unique attributes to defeat their opponents.

programme.title: Africa's Hunters
programme.desc: A pride of lions faces a leadership challenge, putting the current dominant males under pressure to defend their position.

programme.title: A Wild Year on Earth
programme.desc: In July, Arctic ice sheets crash into the sea while an arctic fox hunts among the rocks. In Africa, herds of wildebeest cross the crocodile-infested Mara river.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: A fisherman's illegal catch provides a feast for Hope's patients, and an invasive species also winds up on the menu.

programme.title: The Big Dry
programme.desc: The dry season in Zambia's Luangwa Valley, with wildlife having to cope with extreme temperatures and no rain for seven months.

programme.title: Wild Science
programme.desc: Tracing the brown bear's evolution from Ice Age giants to modern omnivores, and witnessing their bond with salmon and the intricate ecosystems that shape their survival.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Sun bear cubs Denny Bear and India arrive at a sister sanctuary. A quiet day in the clinic turns hectic when two orangutans fall dangerously ill.

programme.title: Big Cats Small World
programme.desc: Part one of two. The lives of three rival species, lions, leopards and cheetahs, revealing the strategies each has evolved to coexist in their shared world.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: Hope tries to save a fawn that has survived a snare and a bobcat attack. A baby bobcat winds up on Hope's doorstep, and an old friend returns to the rehab.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: A balding macaque receives protection from his troop's over-enthusiastic grooming, and the park is saddened by the death of alpha male capuchin Tom, who was at the centre for seven years. Elsewhere, the chimps are given walnuts and Jestah gets more than his fair share.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison Cronin springs into action when an adult female chimpanzee in Mexico urgently needs the team's help. Even Lulu joins in the fun when the nursery chimps have a play session, and Kai tries to act independent and grown up while discouraging Amy from joining in his games.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Wine ditches lessons to make a new friend. Two refugees from a Thai circus get a second chance at living semi-wild on a pre-release island.

programme.desc: Part two of two. Molelo's pride are exhausted when the winter floods arrive. The cheetah cubs make a difficult decision, and a scary encounter makes leopard mum Sephiri choose between her old family and her new cubs.

programme.desc: A hyena goes in search of a new clan, a challenge that will require all its strength, intelligence and cunning.

programme.desc: Amanda meets one of the first cheetahs to be born in Malawi in 20 years, while tourists deliver a rowdy monkey rescued from the pet trade, and a python gets a check-up.

programme.desc: Bryce and Emily Sandvall want a new home for their family of five in the Woodway area that's not only right for their family but also has a traditional design style that they love.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna Gaines remember their favorite renovations and share bloopers and outtakes from all three seasons.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A man surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
